what_it_does: Defines a stroke-only SVG icon with a 24x24 viewBox, an outlined circle, and a checkmark path.
observations: Root svg declares the SVG namespace and viewBox "0 0 24 24".
The icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling is set to width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
A circle is centered at 12,12 with radius 9.
The checkmark is drawn with the path "M7.5 12.5 L11 16 L16.5 9".
standouts: The icon inherits color through currentColor.
The visual is built from two simple primitives: a circle and a checkmark path.
conventions: Follows a 24x24 inline SVG icon pattern.
Uses round stroke caps and joins for softened path endings and corners.
Contains no ids, classes, embedded styles, or scripts.
notes: A compact success/confirmation outline icon: circle plus checkmark.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename/path imply a success-outline icon, and the content matches by rendering an outlined circle with a checkmark.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a scalable success or confirmation indicator that can adopt the surrounding text color.
contribution: Provides a reusable stroke-based success icon composed from simple SVG geometry and designed for color inheritance.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroke-only SVG success outline icon made from a circular outline and checkmark path using currentColor.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing successful completion or confirmation in a scalable design-system icon asset.
